## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Wording fix (grammar, spelling, formatting, typos)
- [ ] Content improvement (clarification without behavior change)
- [ ] Contract change (alters documented public behavior)
- [ ] New page

## Verification

- [ ] `yarn build` passes
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes (if TS/JS or Docusaurus config changed)
- [ ] This PR changes exactly one thing
- [ ] The diff is small and focused
- [ ] `sidebars.ts` is updated (if a new page was added)

## Contract Changes

<!-- Only applicable if "Contract change" is checked above. -->

- [ ] Backend source evidence is available or a maintainer has confirmed the change
